title: Tipped arrow+ reimagined
description: Adds custom texture to arrows, bow and crossbow (crossbow with tipped arrow uncluded)
body:
Adds custom texture to tipped arrows, bow and crossbow (crossbow with tipped arrow included)

To run this resourcepack you will need to install optifine (or cit resewn), and it will automatically replace arrows, bow and crossbow with their "custom" version

Visit my twitter page: https://twitter.com/insanisart

My sketchfab: https://sketchfab.com/insanis_art
